x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: VA topics define the conversational use cases Now Assist can assist with. More published topics means broader AI-assisted self-service coverage and more opportunities to deflect incidents.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review and publish additional VA topics via sys_cs_topic_list.do. Prioritize topics for high-volume incident categories and catalog items. Target: 50+ published topics. Now Assist enhances existing VA topics with AI — more published topics means broader AI-assisted self-service coverage.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c25
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[VA topics define the conversational use cases Now Assist can assist with. More published topics means broader AI-assisted self-service coverage and more opportunities to deflect incidents.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Active VA Topic Count</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_topic');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addQuery('published', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' published active VA topics';

    if (count >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' published VA topics. Now Assist has broad topic coverage for AI-enhanced ITSM self-service.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published VA topics (target: 50+). Limited topic coverage restricts Now Assist AI-assisted self-service scope.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published VA topics. Insufficient topic coverage for meaningful Now Assist ITSM self-service — publish topics for high-volume incident categories first.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005960</number>
<order>210</order>
<remediation_guidance>Review and publish additional VA topics via sys_cs_topic_list.do. Prioritize topics for high-volume incident categories and catalog items. Target: 50+ published topics. Now Assist enhances existing VA topics with AI — more published topics means broader AI-assisted self-service coverage.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c25</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
